intent: Write a community-and-canon piece on 'what /f/showerthoughts actually gets right about a topic'. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — browse /f/showerthoughts AND /f/Showerthoughts for top posts that make a semi-philosophical claim. Pick one theme (perception, memory, language, etc.) and collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (2) Wikipedia — open the relevant article on the topic (e.g. 'Perception', 'Linguistic relativity', 'Memory') and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) state the theme, (b) present the shower-thought claims, (c) evaluate each against the Wikipedia entry, (d) close with a short reflection on what the community intuits but cannot formalize. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Reddit (both showerthoughts spellings) + Wikipedia. Intuition-vs-formalism arc.
